From Empty Folder to Live Salon: Building Zen|Santiago

My own salon, a blank folder, and a deadline. Here's the full build journey of building my beauty salon's website — the design system, the data-driven menu, the features that shipped, the ones I killed, and what I learned shipping a static site that has to convert real customers.

ServiceNow Notification Templates

A collection of modern, professional HTML email templates for ServiceNow notifications. Five different styles inspired by popular brands to make your notifications stand out.

March 05, 2025 AI

Building MCP Servers with Role-Based Access Control

MCP servers let AI assistants like Claude talk to your internal tools — but without access control, that's a security conversation you don't want to have. Here's how to build MCP servers with RBAC baked in from the start.

Read More →
February 10, 2025 IT

Immy.bot: The Endpoint Manager You Didn't Know You Needed

Immy.bot is the endpoint management tool that actually gets onboarding right — software deployments that are smart enough to know what's already installed, what version it is, and whether it needs to be there at all.

Read More →
January 15, 2025 ServiceNow

ServiceNow Build Agent: CI/CD for Your Instance

ServiceNow's Build Agent brings real CI/CD to your instance — automated pipelines that move apps from dev to prod without the manual export and pray method.

December 20, 2024 Security

Microsoft Says Password Expiry Makes You Less Secure

Microsoft's research reveals that forcing password changes actually makes systems less secure. Here's why the traditional wisdom about password expiry is wrong.

December 19, 2024 ServiceNow

Do We Really Need REQs in ServiceNow?

A deep dive into whether ServiceNow Requests (REQs) are always necessary, exploring the pros and cons of skipping them and when it might actually work.
